_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: We also confirmed the upregulation of LAMB1 and NID1 by TGF-β1 in the human pNF cell line hTERT ipNF05.5. Notably, the expression level of phospho-ERK was increased by TGF-β1 treatment
details: Upregulation of LAMB1 and NID1 by TGF-β1 treatment, with increased phospho-ERK expression
